Short CV

Buse Sabiha Bozaslan graduated from the Department of Molecular Biology and Genetics of Cumhuriyet University. Bozaslan has completed her master's degree in the Department of Forensic Science, Institute of Forensic Medicine, Istanbul University in 2016. She is currently continuing his doctoral studies in the Department of Forensic Science, Institute of Forensic Medicine, Istanbul University.
